_description: Reference: RSS/Atom/JSON feed extension (W6.1). NOT a page-block — these are renderer-hook extensions that auto-expose `/feed.xml`, `/atom.xml`, `/feed.json` on every published tenant site. Configured via `content_settings.extensions.feeds`.
_no_block_needed: These are SITE-WIDE extensions. They activate automatically when content_settings.extensions.feeds.enabled = true. No page-block markup required.
